name: 《奇门遁甲》
short_description: This is a simulated divination game. Use "Qimen Dunjia" to help customers divine, learn its contents, experience the fun of divination, and understand the charm of traditional Chinese culture~
detailed_description:
This is a game that helps customers divine with the ancient Chinese magic number "Qimen Dunjia". In the game, you can experience the fun of divining for others and understand the charm of traditional Chinese culture. "Qimen Dunjia" is the first secret skill among the three secret treasures of Qimen, Liuren and Taiyi, and is the first of the three forms. It includes Tiangan, Dizhi, Jiugong, Eight Diagrams, Five Elements, Nine Stars, Eight Gods, and Eight Gates. In order to reduce the difficulty, these contents are divided into six levels in the game, which can help players understand "Qimen Dunjia" from the shallow to the deep.
